lenses.guidance: vv 1-4 (excluding the unclean), vv 5-10 (restitution for wronging a neighbor), vv 11-31 (ordeal for suspected adultery) form a triple structure of community boundaries — body, property, intimacy each policed in turn.

vv 5-7's restitution-plus-a-fifth — 'when anyone wrongs another, they must add a fifth of the value to it' — echoes throughout Scripture into Lk 19:8 where Zacchaeus pays back fourfold. The restorative principle threads from law to gospel.
